overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from The Witcher 3 showing Geralt walking along a coastal cliff path at dusk. The character passes a wooden shipwreck and ancient stone ruins with a twisted dead tree, creating a dark atmospheric fantasy setting with blue-green lighting.

scene_state.functional_zone: coastal cliffside dirt trail with shipwreck

agents.ego_description: Geralt walking steadily along the coastal dirt path toward the stone ruins visible in the distance

entered.detail: large wooden vessel with broken masts beached on the rocky shore
rocky cliff face rising alongside the path
ancient stone structures visible ahead on the path
wooden crates and barriers lining the right side of the trail

segments.scene_description: Geralt walks along a dirt trail on a coastal cliff at dusk, with a large wooden shipwreck visible to the left and ancient stone ruins ahead. The path is bordered by grass and wooden barriers while the sky shows dark blue twilight tones.

scene_state.functional_zone: ancient stone ruin passage with red banner

events.description: transitioning from dirt trail to cobblestone path through stone ruins

agents.ego_description: Geralt continues walking through the stone ruins, approaching a large twisted tree with a red banner visible atop the structure ahead

entered.detail: stone structure with a prominent red cloth banner flying from the top
large gnarled dead tree with twisted branches and red fabric
stone staircase leading upward through the ruins

segments.scene_description: The path transitions to cobblestone as Geralt walks through ancient stone ruins. A large twisted dead tree with a red banner becomes visible ahead while the shipwreck disappears behind, and stone steps come into view leading upward.

scene_state.functional_zone: cliffside cobblestone path passing gnarled tree

events.description: passing the large twisted dead tree structure on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: Geralt walks past the twisted tree and continues along the narrow cobblestone path hugging the coastal cliff

entered.detail: dark ocean water visible below the cliff edge

segments.scene_description: Geralt passes the twisted dead tree on his left and continues along the narrow cobblestone path hugging the coastal cliff, with the dark sea visible below. The stone ruins remain visible ahead while the red banner structure falls behind.

scene_state.functional_zone: grassy hillside with scattered stone ruins

events.description: veering off the cobblestone path onto grassy terrain uphill

agents.ego_description: Geralt leaves the stone path to walk up a grassy slope, exploring the terrain before returning to the trail

entered.detail: grassy hillside with wildflowers and uneven ground
broken wooden fence posts along the left side

segments.scene_description: Geralt veers off the cobblestone path onto a grassy hillside, exploring the terrain before returning to the trail. Stone ruins become more prominent in the foreground as he approaches, while the coastal view and twisted tree fall behind.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a coastal cliffside that transitions from a shipwrecked shoreline into a desolate area of ancient stone ruins. It begins with Geralt walking a dirt trail past a large wooden shipwreck under a dark blue twilight sky, moving forward as the path shifts from earth to cobblestone. As the camera advances through the ruins, the shipwreck vanishes from view and is replaced by a large twisted dead tree adorned with a red banner. The scene then follows the narrow path hugging the cliff edge above the dark sea before veering off onto a grassy hillside. Finally, the camera turns back toward the trail as the coastal vista recedes and the stone ruins become the prominent focus in the foreground.
